effect.subject: underline_and_italic
effect.reserved_for: underline: real hyperlinks only; italic: study names, notes, and citations

rule_text: No underlining except real hyperlinks. No italic for emphasis in patient copy — reserve italics for study names, notes ('Note:'), and citations.
intent: Keep underline as a link affordance and restrict italic to structural uses, not emphasis.
summary: No underlining except hyperlinks; italics only for study names, notes ('Note:'), and citations, not for emphasis in patient copy.
